name: Tone Adaptation
description: Adapts brand voice and communication tone across different platforms, audiences, contexts, and cultural moments — ensuring copy and messaging land right every time, whether professional, playful, urgent, or empathetic.

variables.name: original_copy
variables.description: The original copy or content to be adapted

variables.name: source_brand
variables.description: The brand voice and tone guidelines to adapt from

variables.name: target_context
variables.description: The target platform, context, or cultural moment

variables.name: audience
variables.description: Target audience and their tone expectations

variables.name: tone_shift
variables.description: Specific tone direction — e.g., more playful, more formal, more urgent

inputs.name: original_copy
inputs.description: The original copy or content to be adapted

inputs.name: source_brand
inputs.description: The brand voice and tone guidelines to adapt from

inputs.name: target_context
inputs.description: The target platform, context, or cultural moment

inputs.name: audience
inputs.description: Target audience and their tone expectations

inputs.name: tone_shift
inputs.description: Specific tone direction — e.g., more playful, more formal, more urgent
